reviews.review_description:
I give this game 3/5 stars.
It is awesome to build things in your house or in the VR world. 
This is a great idea but it could be improved.

Such as, there arent that many blocks to choose from so if we get more blocks and block types that would be cool(stairs slabs what have you) 
But unlike the unc that reviewed it it's not entirely a waste of money. Like the game isn't even at 1.0 yet it pretty early development as I can tell. I'm really excited to the future of the game and what the devs can turn it into.

developer_response.body:
A brand new version with massive updates has been released today, chek it out!
(and lots of new features are planned in the near future)

reviews.review_description: I've played worse, however they removed a feature I have clearly seen online: going in holes you dug! Also, there is no tnt either. Would not recommend unless it is fixed.

reviews.review_title: Cannot enter the holes you dug.
reviews.review_description: I guess new version has some bug, you can crush blocks and dig holes but you cannot enter the hole in Mixed Reality versions.

developer_response.body: the feature has been deativated in this release but it will be back soon better than ever!

reviews.review_description: Bought this for my son and nothing actually works on it. Don’t waste your money like we did!

developer_response.body:
Sorry for your experience!
A brand new version with massive updates has been released today, chek it out!

reviews.review_description: The game is fun to play and a great thing to do if you are bored but the price is a bit high
I brought this game from a vid. And it scammed me
Glitchy and ugly

I didn't give it a 5 star because it was fun but it gets really boring after a little bit and then I just get off vr
but it's fun
It is the best game in mr like minecraft here is wow ＼(^_^)／(^o^)(^o^)(^o^)(^o^)(^o^)(^o^)(^o^)(^o^)(　＾∀＾)(　＾ω＾)😃😃😃😃😶😶😶😶😀😀🙃🙃🫠🫠

reviews.review_title: Love this App - Mixed Reality Minecraft!
reviews.review_description: I really enjoy hopping in this app from time to time. While simple, it always blows my mind to break my actual floor and build a house in my living room. Hope for more updates someday!
Spending £7.99 for a basic game is a waste!The game has no colours in the pass through games and the bombs have a limit of 3.Why not give 999 like the blocks?

developer_response.body:
Sorry for your experience, we.re working on a free update that should be released very soon.
Could you please be more specific about "no colours in the pass through"? The passthrough color depends on the hardware: Quest 3/3s/Pro has color pt, Quest2 doesn't.

reviews.review_description: Bought for my son and it doesn't allow him to click on any of the options to play

developer_response.body:
Sorry for your experience!
A brand new version with massive updates has been released today, chek it out!

reviews.review_description: Digging the real ground and jumping in is the most impressive experience I ever had on a Quest
it's great I love the immersion and you should definitely get BlockVerse
I liked it at first but the graphics are horrible the ge is boring and also cost 7:99 big scam and I hate the owner's of the game for scaming me

reviews.review_title: Don't buy this - no updates in 2 years
reviews.review_description:
I am a long time Minecraft fan, circa 2011, and so wanted to see this game. The videos I saw were great. However the developer seems to have abandoned this product, and in it's current state, it really should be removed from the Meta store.

Also, the game nicely gives you the ability to move forward but nott to turn, without turning your whole body. That's grate if you are going for more immersion, but it greatly limits the game for disabled players, such as myself.

The game also crashes frequently, adding to the frustration, and doesn't save game progress when it crashes.

Do NOT recommend this game until more work is done, or at least the developer communicates clear plans to do more work.

developer_response.body:
Hi, developer here!
I'm going to push a pretty big update very soon (by the end of the month) and then continue on regular basis adding new features each time. Sorry for the delay!

reviews.review_description: I saw this game off of YouTube and immediately knew I would love it and even though the graphics are bad I love just messing around and digging bottomless holes 🕳also I would love If they added like water zombies and grass to the living room craft mode

This is my first one star review I'm definitely refunding this, the graphics suck the game is broken and there's nothing to do, you can break water with a pickaxe there's no mobs or any point to playing the game at all plus when you break a block it will find you around if you're under it there's no jump option and there's no real reason to buy this when a better free version is on applab what you're gonna do is download side quest on your phone or computer and link it to your quest 2/3 with a USB-C to USB-C cable and connect it from your phone or computer (for computer just use a cable like a phone charger)
You're gonna search up "QuestCraft" and you're gonna press "sideload game" after that you're gonna wait for it to download and to find it go to unknown sources in the category tab add me if there's anything else you wanna know

this game right now is kind of a mess but i still think it has lots of potential, the MR game mode is really fun but gets basic quick, i think the devs should add the room scanning for q3 so you can interact with your walls and ceiling along with your floor, the normal mode is fine and i think the in the 1.0 version they should add more stuff and a clear progression to the game, they said they would be adding multiplayer and i think if they add a way to beat the game and a lot more stuff and actually make it a survival game mode instead of just a worse creative, it would be really fun and pretty popular. also PLEASE add some more setting for the audio, it’s so annoying hearing the same 5 second song over and over and make me not want to play it. i really want to see this game succeed and i think it can but the devs need to actually do consistent updates and make fun and engaging gameplay, anyways i don’t think you should buy this game right now but maybe if they keep updating it it will be worth the price.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review and suggestions. Working hard for an update and new features!

reviews.review_title: Honestly one of the best apps I have
reviews.review_description: I just recently found this game and decided to buy it, and it is absolutely worth the ten dollars. Apart from a few lag here and there it is a really fun game and I can see a good future for it :).

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Working hard for an update and new features!

reviews.review_description:
Takes forever to load.
May not load completely.
When it does load, the controls are unusable.
Whatever you saw on YouTube, well they must have had a version that worked with old Oculus/Meta versions, because as of 12/22/23, it is unusable.

I’m not sure why Meta allows a place for an App that started as an investor scam, and after a YEAR is a piece of unfinished crap.

Well I get to test Meta’s refund system now…

developer_response.body:
Sorry for your experience, would be helpful to know which Quest and firmware version were you using.

Btw, Blockverse has no investors, it is a solo developer work so I really don't get the investor scam part.

reviews.review_description:
PLEASE YOU MADE THE GREATEST THING EVER

Update: thanks dev ;)

developer_response.body: Thank you, I'm working on a big update and new features, please hold on!

reviews.review_description: It's not a perfect experience, but certainly worth $10 for a few hours (or infinite hours) of fun.  There is only one save slot (that I'm aware of) so the same AR map loads up regardless of your play space setup and is orientated based on how you're standing when you put the headset on each time.  But I was able to build one area in my backyard, and a separate area that lined up with my office (simply by turning around 180 after putting on the headset).  I hope there are additional save slots in the future!  Certainly one of the first thing I'll show friends when I demo the headset, likely by loading my backyard build into their own backyard.
Pretty cool app

ITS fun... but ...How can we mute the music?...ITS annoying!
Yoi have to listen the 10sec Jingle again and again..../:

5 stars for potential. It has a lot of potential and is 3 stars for the current state, already pretty good. It feels more like a really cool demo right now though, but it is in app lab so hopefully more features are added. Such as ladders or a way to elevate yourself higher to work on high structures. Be able to jump onto blocks. The water blocks looked a little weird, not really blue, it was hard to see that I placed anything. Sometimes the tracking was off. It would be cool if could recognize walls and you could tunnel through your wall in your house or something, or be able to change the texture of your physical wall. Anyway there's so much potential for the app and I am excited to see where it goes.

Great with passthrough on Quest 3. Really impressive! Great for showing the power of VR/AR. My only issue is the blocks don't stay together after destroying adjacent ones, they start to bounce around. I'd like them to stay connected so I can continue my build without the physics randomly disconnecting things.

reviews.review_title: Has potential, but still needs work
reviews.review_description:
The controls, especially turning with the grab button pressed, are uncomfortable.
The torches cannot be placed and there apparently are no inhabitants in the world yet.
But you can imagine what could come of it one day and so I let myself be surprised.
Its nice but PLEASE make Smoothturn and a Option to turn off this annoying loud music
I've hit every single button on the controller. Can't click out of the main menu, I guess I'm gonna have to get a refund, it was a cool idea too :/

For one I want to say. I love the ideas you have for the worlds you create. Lots to do for sure. However; with that said. Not being able to turn that annoying music off sucks. I’d rather hear the game in silence( no music), or at the very least have a option. 
    On another note I found it incredibly glitchy, and movement was not great at all. For now I’ll be refunding it, but I’m going to keep my eye on updates for it. Also would like to see more of the survival aspects.
    Is there a reason everything is stuck at an angle? This seriously drives me crazy. I keep trying to make it straight. Usually silly things like this will destroy this title. Sadly it has many great things about it.
I was trying to find a Minecraft vr alternative to play before it became native to the quest

The options here are quite impressive and I like the Passthrough options.

I know it's early days yet but this has potential. Unless I missed the option, I'd like to see animals/people populating created worlds.

My son just played and thoroughly enjoyed it.

Looking forward to updates.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! In a upcoming update there will be multiplayer and lots of new features.

reviews.review_description: This first version shows much promise. Unfortunately, the controls are very glitchy and need a fair amount of tweaking. It needs more options for turning, i.e. right stick. Having to hold left grip for turning is terrible. Movement also has its issues, I keep getting stuck on the floor, unable to move around correctly. Some general options (i.e. mute the music) would be appreciated also. Hopefully, these issues can easily be fixed.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! An update with fixes and lots of new features is on its way.

reviews.review_description: It's so amazing to dig under the room floor and build structures in my living room with the passthrough!!! Also the full VR is very cool: I can create my personal world and fight hungry zombies!!! Yeah!

fantastic app, really well done congratulations to the developers!

Device:Oculus Quest 2
The best VR block sandbox around!
The price is fair for what it offers. Awesome  demonstration of mixed reality. Really fun. But please add option to tweak soud volume and especialy music.
Works really well on a Quest 3. Super fun!
